rules.name: Usage of 'any' type
rules.message: any bypasses type checking — use unknown, a specific type, or generics

rules.name: Non-null assertion operator
rules.message: Non-null assertion (!) bypasses null checks — use optional chaining or explicit guard

rules.name: Dangerous eval/Function usage
rules.message: eval()/new Function() enables code injection — use JSON.parse() or sandboxed execution

rules.name: innerHTML assignment
rules.message: innerHTML enables XSS — use textContent, DOM APIs, or a sanitizer library

rules.name: console.log in production code
rules.message: console.log in production — remove or replace with structured logger

rules.name: document.write usage
rules.message: document.write() is a security risk and blocks parsing — use DOM manipulation

rules.name: Hardcoded secret/token
rules.message: Hardcoded credential detected — use environment variables
